en: The SPQR Study Guides series is designed to make it easy for students of all levels to dip their toes into antiquity. It includes 20 volumes of classical books broken down by chapter
with each Latin chapter followed by its equivalent English chapter. It also gives you the running vocabulary for each chapter as you read
in case you need a little help or if you’re revising the text for an exam.
meanings.shortEn: The SPQR Study Guides series is designed to make it easy for students of all levels to dip their toes into antiquity. It includes 20 volumes of classical books broken down by chapter

en: Words used at least 100-199 times alo
